lines.speaker: Sir Lancelot
lines.text: Greetings! I am Sir Lancelot, the greatest Knight in the land! What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a little full of yourself aren't you?

lines.speaker: Sir Lancelot
lines.text: I have every right to be proud of myself.

lines.speaker: Sir Lancelot
lines.text: My prowess in battle is world renowned!

lines.speaker: Sir Lancelot
lines.text: Greetings! I am Sir Lancelot, the greatest Knight in the land! What do you want?

lines.speaker: Sir Lancelot
lines.text: Sir Knight! Many thanks for your assistance in restoring Merlin to his former freedom!

lines.speaker: Sir Lancelot
lines.text: Greetings! I am Sir Lancelot, the greatest Knight in the land! What do you want?

lines.speaker: Sir Lancelot
lines.text: Humph. You are indeed a better knight than I first suspected.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Gee, it was nothing saving you all from the clutches of Morgan Le Faye and freeing your King.
